prompt:
Take the provided reference image (line-art illustration of upright protector tube — black cap on top, white body below) and reproduce it PIXEL-FAITHFULLY in every element except the DIALED text on the cap.

The HEALTH text on the white body is CORRECT — keep it exactly as-is. DO NOT touch the body or its HEALTH text.

>>> FIX THE DIALED TEXT ON THE BLACK CAP <<<

The DIALED text in the reference is rendered with the LETTERS ROTATED IN THE WRONG DIRECTION, so reading the cap top-to-bottom currently spells D-E-L-A-I-D (DIALED reversed/backwards). The viewer needs to tilt their head the WRONG way to read it forward, which is unintuitive.

MATCH THE LETTER ROTATION OF THE BODY'S HEALTH TEXT — the HEALTH letters on the body are rotated such that reading top-down spells HEALTH forward (when the viewer tilts their head to the right, head-tilt-clockwise). The DIALED letters on the cap must use this SAME rotation direction, so reading top-down on the cap also spells DIALED forward (D-I-A-L-E-D, first D at top, last D at bottom) when the viewer tilts their head the same way.

In concrete terms — each letter of DIALED is rotated 90° in the SAME direction as the HEALTH letters on the body. Each letter's TOP edge faces the SAME side of the tube as the HEALTH letters' tops do. After this fix, reading the cap top-to-bottom (with the same head tilt the viewer uses for the body) produces 'DIALED' spelled forward, with the FIRST D at the very top of the cap and the LAST D at the bottom of the cap just above the cap/body seam.

The simplest description: COPY THE LETTER ORIENTATION AND DIRECTION FROM THE HEALTH TEXT ON THE BODY, and apply it to the DIALED text on the cap. Both words must use the same letter rotation direction so they read forward when scanned top-down with the same head-tilt.

All other style aspects stay identical — thin WHITE outline strokes against the solid-black cap fill, bold sans-serif capitals, same letter size, same band position on the cap.

After the fix, the assembled tube reads top-down: BLACK CAP showing DIALED forward (D-I-A-L-E-D) → WHITE BODY showing HEALTH forward (H-E-A-L-T-H) = 'DIALED HEALTH' linearly top-down, both words readable with the SAME head-tilt direction.

Do NOT modify anything else — same tube proportions, same composition, same body, same correct HEALTH text orientation, same line weight, same white background, same line-art aesthetic. The ONLY change is matching the DIALED letter rotation to the HEALTH letter rotation.

No frame, no border, no other labels, no numbers.
